pkgmetadata.longdescription: Out-of-tree build of the NTFS(NTFS PLUS) filesystem driver maintained by Namjae Jeon. Provides a backport so modern NTFS support can be used on older kernels (6.1 and newer). The built module is named 'ntfs' and conflicts with the legacy in-kernel NTFS driver (CONFIG_NTFS_FS).
